comingSoon.title: {{section}} coming soon
comingSoon.body: This settings screen is in the build queue and will appear here in an upcoming release.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: People with access to this workspace.
members.error: Couldn't load members. Please try again.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.subtitle: Send an invitation to join this workspace.

error.emailExists: A member with that email already exists.
error.generic: Couldn't send the invite. Please try again.

deactivate.title: Deactivate {{name}}?
deactivate.body: They will lose access to this workspace immediately.
deactivate.sessionsNote: All of their active sessions will be signed out right away.

toast.invitedNoEmail: {{email}} was added. No email was sent — SMTP isn't configured.
toast.resentNoEmail: No email was sent — SMTP isn't configured.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

groups.title: User groups
groups.subtitle: Static pools curated by admins — distinct from roles, which are dynamic RBAC. A group can be assigned work directly.
groups.error: Couldn't load user groups. Please try again.

create.title: Add user group
create.subtitle: Group members for assignment and notification targeting.
create.nameDuplicate: A group with that name already exists.

error.nameExists: A group with that name already exists.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

members.title: Members of {{name}}
members.subtitle: Select the members of this group.

delete.title: Delete group?
delete.body: “{{name}}” will be removed and its membership cleared. This can't be undone.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

orgChart.title: Org chart
orgChart.subtitle: Reporting structure — referenced by delegation rules and notification escalations. The tree is validated to prevent cycles.
orgChart.empty: No org chart yet. Add the top-level unit to get started.
orgChart.error: Couldn't load the org chart. Please try again.

error.cycle: That move would create a cycle in the org chart.
error.multipleRoots: The org chart already has a root unit.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

members.title: Manage members of {{name}}
members.subtitle: Members here report into this unit (their primary unit).
members.auditNote: Saved changes are recorded in the audit log.

delete.title: Delete unit?
delete.body: “{{name}}” will be removed and its members unassigned. This can't be undone.

toast.hasChildren: Move or delete its sub-units first.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Roles drive dynamic RBAC. Workflow blocks assign work to roles; tenant policy decides who in a role may act.
roles.error: Couldn't load roles. Please try again.
roles.empty: Select a role to view its permissions.

toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

create.title: New role
create.subtitle: Create a custom role, then grant it capabilities in the permission matrix.
create.nameInvalid: Use letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
create.nameDuplicate: A role with that name already exists.

error.nameExists: A role with that name already exists.
error.generic: Couldn't create the role. Please try again.

error.inUse: This role is in use by active policy rules — reassign members first.
error.generic: Couldn't delete the role. Please try again.

matrix.heading: Permissions
matrix.saveError: Couldn't save some changes. Please try again.
matrix.confirmBody_one: Removing this allow rule may lock members out of {{count}} capability. Continue?
matrix.confirmBody_other: Removing these allow rules may lock members out of {{count}} capabilities. Continue?

audit.heading: Recent activity
audit.empty: No recent policy changes for this role.
audit.viewAllSoon: Full audit log is coming soon.

passwordMinLength.tooltip: Minimum number of characters required for member passwords.
passwordMinLength.description: Enforced when members set or reset a password. Allowed range is 8–128 characters.

sessionLifetimeHours.tooltip: How long a sign-in stays valid before re-authentication.
sessionLifetimeHours.description: Members must sign in again after this many hours. Allowed range is 1–720 hours.

security.title: Security
security.sub: Sign-in policy, sessions, and single sign-on for this workspace.
security.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

password.title: Password policy
password.sub: Rules enforced when members set or reset a password.

sessions.title: Sessions & MFA
sessions.sub: How long a sign-in lasts and whether multi-factor is required.
sessions.mfaRequiredHint: Every member must enrol an authenticator app.

sso.title: Single sign-on (SSO)
sso.sub: Delegate sign-in to your identity provider (OIDC or SAML).
sso.enableHint: Members sign in through your identity provider.
sso.providerRequired: A provider name is required to save SSO.
sso.enforceHint: Disable password sign-in except for admin break-glass.
sso.allowAdminFallbackHint: Admins can still sign in with a password if SSO is down.

eventLog.error: Couldn't load events. Please try again.

audit.title: Audit logs
audit.sub: Tamper-evident record of every privileged action in this workspace.
audit.exportError: Couldn't export the audit log. Please try again.

securityEvents.title: Security events
securityEvents.sub: Sign-in, session, and authorization events for this workspace.
securityEvents.exportError: Couldn't export the security events. Please try again.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.sub: Configure how AI helps your team. Disabled by default; admins opt in.
ai.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
ai.enableHint: Workflow designer, document summarization, and chat assistant become available.

provider.title: Provider & model
provider.sub: Choose a hosted model and provide its key, or point at a self-hosted Ollama endpoint.
provider.modelRequired: Select a model to enable AI.
provider.keyHint: Encrypted at rest and never shown again. Used server-side only.
provider.ollamaHint: Self-hosted Ollama endpoint — no key required; data stays in your network.
provider.ollamaRequired: A base URL is required for a self-hosted model.

storage.title: Storage access
storage.sub: Where this workspace's documents are stored.
storage.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
storage.managedDescription: Documents are stored on the platform-managed object store. Switch to your own S3-compatible bucket below.
storage.byoDescription: Documents are stored on your own S3-compatible bucket.
storage.byoSub: Point this workspace at your own MinIO, AWS S3, or S3-compatible endpoint.
storage.forcePathStyleHint: Required for MinIO and most S3-compatible servers.
storage.credentialNote: Credentials are encrypted at rest and never shown again. The connection is validated before it goes active.

subscription.title: Plan & usage
subscription.sub: Your subscription tier, seat usage, and license.
subscription.error: Couldn't load subscription details. Please try again.

caps.title: Plan limits
caps.sub: The caps included with your current plan.

license.title: License
license.invalid: That license key is not valid.
license.uploadError: Couldn't verify the license key. Please try again.

features.title: Features
features.sub: Modules available on your plan. Gated modules unlock on higher tiers.
features.note: Governance, workflows, documents, and the library are included in every tier.

upload.title: Activate a license key
upload.sub: Self-hosted installations paste their signed license key here to verify and activate it.
upload.label: License key

referralCredits.title: Referral & credits
referralCredits.sub: Your referral rewards and account credit.

referral.title: Refer & earn
referral.sub: Share your link — when someone you refer subscribes, you're rewarded.
referral.summaryError: Couldn't load your referral details. Please try again.
referral.activeReferralsHint: Counts referrals who subscribed and are still active.

discount.title: Your subscription discount
discount.sub: Earned from your active referrals and applied to your own subscription.
discount.topTier: You've reached the top discount tier.

list.title: Referrals
list.sub: Everyone you've referred and their current reward state.
list.error: Couldn't load your referrals. Please try again.
list.empty: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started.

credit.balanceSub: Spendable credit and grants still in their hold window.
credit.balanceError: Couldn't load your credit balance. Please try again.
credit.note: Credit is applied automatically to platform charges. It's discount-only — it never expires and can't be cashed out.
credit.historySub: Every grant, applied credit, and adjustment on your account.
credit.historyError: Couldn't load your credit history. Please try again.

landing.title: Settings
landing.sub: Tenant configuration and your personal preferences.

links.notificationsDesc: Tenant notification routing and per-type channel defaults.
links.inboundEmailDesc: Operate the parked inbound-email queue — release, reassign, or discard messages.
links.designerDesc: Open the workflow designer to model and publish process definitions.
links.subflowsDesc: Browse and manage reusable subflow building blocks.

general.title: General
general.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
general.sectionSub: Your tenant's name, region, and address.
general.nameHint: Shown across the app and on your sign-in page.
general.regionHint: Where your workspace is hosted. Contact your administrator to migrate regions.
general.workspaceHint: Your subdomain address. Only an administrator can change it.

branding.title: Branding
branding.sub: Customize how your tenant looks to users — sign-in page, top bar, and primary action color.
branding.saveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
branding.logoHint: SVG, PNG, or WebP · max 2 MB.
branding.footerHint: Appended to notification emails. Basic HTML is allowed.
branding.assetUploadError: Couldn't upload the image. Please try again.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.sub: Personal settings that apply only to you on this device.

display.title: Display
display.sub: Theme and density. These apply only to you and don't affect other users in your tenant.
display.themeSub: Choose light, dark, or follow your operating system.
display.themeSystemHint: Follows your OS appearance setting and updates automatically when it changes.
display.densitySub: Reduces table and card padding for dense work surfaces.
display.primarySub: Used for buttons, active nav, and primary actions.
display.fontSub: The typeface used across the app. Defaults to your workspace's font.

appearance.title: Default typography
appearance.sub: The default UI font for this workspace. Members can override it in their display preferences.
appearance.hint: Right-to-left locales default to Vazirmatn for clear Arabic and Persian text.
appearance.saveError: Couldn't save typography. Please try again.

language.title: Language & region
language.localeSub: The interface language. Text direction follows the language automatically.
